fullname.description: The fully qualified name of the GAPIC/Google API method called.

file_path.description: The absolute path to the source code file containing the call.

line.description: The line number (1-indexed) where the call was detected.

source_line.description: The exact raw code snippet matching the call.

source.description: The parsed inline expression or variable source defining the credentials.

provenance.description: Security provenance classification of the credentials.

identity.description: Simplified identity type for security audits.
